sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Portfolio Architecture & Lifecycle Positioning
required_elements: Business classification (large-cap diversified, specialty pharma, commercial biotech, clinical-stage, platform technology)
Revenue composition by product, therapeutic area, and geography
Patent cliff exposure analysis (products >5% of revenue with expiration dates)
LOE (loss of exclusivity) revenue at risk quantification (5-year timeline)

sections.title: Pipeline Probability-Weighted Valuation — The rNPV Framework
required_elements: Phase-appropriate success probabilities by therapeutic area (Phase 1→2, 2→3, 3→Filing, Filing→Approval)
Peak sales estimation methodology and benchmarking against analogous products
Launch curve modeling (S-curve with year-by-year revenue assumptions)
Cost-to-develop remaining (Phase 3 trial costs, manufacturing scale-up, launch prep)
Total enterprise rNPV (pipeline NPV + commercial product NPV + cash - debt)

sections.title: Commercial Execution & Pricing Risk
required_elements: Sales force size and reach, payer/market access expertise, launch track record
New patient starts, prescription trends (NRx, TRx) trajectory for approved products
IRA Medicare negotiation exposure (products eligible, modeled revenue impact)
PBM/GPO contracting dynamics and 340B program impact
International pricing (European reference pricing dynamics)

sections.title: M&A & Business Development Assessment
required_elements: Balance sheet capacity (net debt/EBITDA, cash on hand, debt financing availability)
Historical deal track record (value-creative vs. value-destructive acquisitions)
Recent transaction strategic logic

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: rNPV primary valuation framework
P/E and EV/EBITDA for commercial-stage companies
Sum-of-the-parts (commercial portfolio NPV + pipeline rNPV + cash - debt)
Binary event valuation for clinical-stage biotech
Cash runway analysis for pre-revenue companies

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Key Phase 3 readout analysis (clinical design, enrollment timeline, competitive landscape)
Patent cliff mitigation assessment (lifecycle management, biosimilar competitive dynamics)
Pricing/reimbursement deep dive (IRA exposure, 340B, international reference pricing)

structural_requirements: All sections present with markdown headings
Patent cliff mapped by product with expiration dates and estimated LOE revenue impact
LOE revenue quantified as percentage of current revenue with timeline (3-5 year)
Pipeline rNPV calculated for all clinical-stage assets with clear probability assumptions
Phase success probabilities documented by therapeutic area
Peak sales estimation methodology transparent with comparables identified
Commercial execution capability assessed with sales force metrics
IRA Medicare negotiation exposure listed by eligible products with modeled impact
M&A capacity quantified (net debt ratio, debt financing availability)
Deal history assessed for value creation/destruction patterns
Investigation tracks include Phase 3 design specifics, competitive landscape, and reimbursement risks
